title: DHBW_fastVanilla
description: DHBW Modpack nearly Vanilla just Performance Mods and Structures
body:
This modpack combines exploration, utility, and performance enhancements to provide a well-rounded Minecraft experience. With **a focus on adventure and exploration**, the pack includes **Mr. Dungeons and Taverns**, adding an array of dungeons, unique structures, and immersive tavern locations for players to discover and loot, enriching the world with new points of interest and challenges.

On the **optimization and visual side**, **Sodium** and **Sodium Extra** deliver improved graphics performance, with **Zoomify** adding enhanced zoom functionality for finer detail. Combined with **ShulkerBoxTooltip** for streamlined inventory management, this pack optimizes the experience without compromising on essential features.

**Key utilities** such as **Xaero's Minimap** and **Xaero's World Map** make navigation and world exploration more intuitive, while **Tree Harvester** introduces faster tree farming for resource gathering. **Placeholder API** and **Yet Another Config Lib** allow for deeper customization, enabling players to adjust settings and personalize gameplay effortlessly.

Designed to run efficiently with **Fabric API**, this pack ensures **smooth updates** and **compatibility with Minecraft 1.21**, making it a versatile choice for players looking for a stable, well-maintained modpack. Whether you’re focused on exploration, resource gathering, or just enjoying a streamlined Minecraft experience, this modpack offers a reliable, performance-focused foundation for any playstyle.
